title: `Eyn #5880
definition:
En-mishpat = "spring of judgment"

 1) a place near southern Palestine coincident or the same place as Kadesh
nasbUsage:
Definition: En-mishpat = "spring of judgment"

 1) a place near southern Palestine coincident or the same place as Kadesh

    NASB:  spring of judgment, another name for a place called Kadesh
